cards.title: Hugging Face Kernels Gets Dedicated Repo Type, Trusted Publishers & Code Signing
cards.why_it_matters: If you're deploying or consuming custom GPU kernels, these security and discoverability upgrades directly affect your supply-chain trust model and workflow.
cards.summary: HF Kernels now has a first-class 'kernel' repository type on the Hub with accelerator/OS/backend metadata. Security hardened via trusted-publisher allowlist (opt-in trust_remote_code for others), Sigstore cosign ephemeral-key signing tied to trusted GitHub workflows, and Nix-based reproducible builds with embedded source Git SHA1. Signature verification on load is not yet enforced pending further testing.
